features.name: unpacked array with incomplete generate initialization leaving 'Z
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array where a generate loop only partially initializes elements, leaving some array elements as high-impedance ('Z)

features.name: array index out of bounds access
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array access using an index that can exceed the array bounds, potentially reading uninitialized or 'Z elements

features.name: 'Z high-impedance treated as zero with --x-assign flag
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array with 'Z elements that should be randomized by --x-assign unique but are instead treated as zero
